meta_title: For Students: SaaS starter kit to Solve can't debug code (Advanced Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome can't debug code. A Advanced-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: SaaS starter kit to Solve can't debug code
content.seo_description: Learn how to use a SaaS starter kit to overcome debugging hurdles. An advanced case study using Antigravity and Claude Code for your first SaaS project.
content.answer_block: The inability to debug complex code often stems from architectural debt. By adopting a pre-validated SaaS starter kit, you inherit battle-tested patterns that eliminate common failure points. Leveraging AI agents like Claude Code and Antigravity allows you to automate structural debugging, letting you focus on feature deployment instead.
content.intro:
The screen flickers with a cascade of red error logs, and the silence in your room feels heavy. You’ve spent hours hunting a phantom bug, realizing that your project architecture is collapsing under its own weight. This is the 'debugging wall'—the exact moment most student developers quit their first SaaS project.

But what if you stopped fighting the framework and started building on a foundation that already works? A professional SaaS starter kit isn't a shortcut; it's a structural insurance policy. By integrating AI-driven debugging tools, you shift from manual troubleshooting to architectural oversight, transforming your development process from a chaotic struggle into a predictable, professional workflow.

steps.title: Bootstrap the Architecture
steps.description: Initialize a robust SaaS starter kit to ensure your authentication, database, and payment layers are pre-configured, reducing the surface area for bugs.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a secure SaaS boilerplate with Next.js, Supabase, and Stripe, ensuring strict TypeScript types and modular directory structure.

steps.title: Automate Structural Validation
steps.description: Use AI to scan your existing codebase for structural inconsistencies that frequently lead to runtime errors.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this codebase for architectural anti-patterns and suggest refactoring paths to improve maintainability and error handling.

steps.title: Implement Intelligent Logging
steps.description: Inject automated observability patterns that allow you to trace state changes across your application lifecycle.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add structured logging middleware to all API routes that captures request payload, session state, and error stack traces.

steps.title: Unit Test Generation
steps.description: Automatically generate test suites for critical paths to ensure future changes don't introduce regressions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Jest test suites for all authentication and payment utility functions to ensure 90% code coverage.

steps.title: Continuous Error Monitoring
steps.description: Set up a feedback loop where Claude Code reviews your commits to catch logic errors before they hit production.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review my recent commit history and identify potential edge cases I missed in the user onboarding flow.

pro_tips: Treat your starter kit as a read-only library; never modify the core infrastructure files unless you absolutely must.
Use AI to explain the error stack trace instead of copying it into Google; ask for the 'root cause' rather than the 'fix'.
Implement feature flags for every new module so you can isolate bugs by toggling features off individually.
Keep your database schema decoupled from your UI logic to prevent cascading failures during refactoring.
Always commit your state *before* asking an AI to fix a bug, allowing you to revert to a known good state instantly.
content.next_steps: Once your starter kit is running, deploy to Vercel and set up a staging environment. Begin building your first user-facing feature while keeping your AI debugging tools active to catch errors in real-time.
content.conversion_block: You now have the framework and the tools to conquer any bug that stands in your way. Stop struggling with syntax errors and start scaling your vision. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
